messages.content:
14.1租户应按照赔偿基础支付房东的费用和开支，包括与以下任何事项相关或考虑到的律师或其他专业人士的费用和开支（在租期结束后也包括在内）：
(a)执行本租约的租户约定的费用；
(b)根据1925年《财产法案》第146或147条项下的规定发送与本租约相关的通知或采取根据这两个条款中的任何一项进行的诉讼程序，尽管违约行为被法院授予的救济方式以外的方式避免；
(c)根据1995年《房东和租户（契约）法案》第17条项下的规定发送与本租约相关的通知；
(d)为与本租约相关的损坏清单的编制和发送；
(e)根据本租约申请的任何同意或批准，无论是否被授予。

翻译成中文：(e)unless the consent or approval is unreasonably withheld or proffered subject to unreasonable conditions) by the Landlord in circumstances where the Landlord is not unreasonable to withhold it); If the event that the Landlord has unreasonable withheld or proffered subject to unreasonable conditions, the Tenant shall not be liable to pay for the Landlord’s cost referred to in Clause 14.1.
(e) 除非房东在不合理情况下拒绝或提出不合理条件（在房东不合理拒绝的情况下），如果房东拒绝或提出不合理条件，租户无需支付第14.1条所提到的房东费用。

翻译成中文： Where the Tenant is obliged to pay or indemnify the Landlord against any solicitors’ or other professionals’ costs and expenses (whether under this or any other clause of this lease) that obligation extends to those costs and expenses assessed on a full indemnity basis.
当租户有义务支付或赔偿房东的律师或其他专业人士的费用和开支时（无论是根据本租约的任何条款还是其他条款），此义务适用于根据完全赔偿基础评估的费用和支出。

翻译成中文is in respect of the period beginning with the date the assignee becomes bound by those covenants and ending on the date when the assignee is released from those covenants by virtue of section 5 of the Landlord and Tenant (Covenants) Act 1995
该费用和开支是指自受让方对这些契约产生约束的日期起至根据1995年《房东和租户（契约）法案》第5条释放受让方对这些契约的义务的日期为止。
翻译成中文(ii)or if earlier the end of the Contractual Term;
或者如果较早，即在合同期限结束之前。
翻译成中文;We have instructions that our client reluctantly agrees provided a Schedule of Conditions is annexed to the Lease. We shall revert with the photographs of the premises shortly.
我们收到指示，我们的客户勉强同意，但需要将一份条件清单附加到租赁合同中。我们将尽快发送有关租赁场所的照片给您。
翻译成中文：The Tenant shall decorate the outside and the inside of the Property as often as is reasonably necessary and also in the last three months before the end of the term
租户应根据合理需要，经常性地装饰物业的内外部，并且在租期结束前的最后三个月内进行装饰。
翻译成中文;provided always that the Tenant shall not be obliged to put the Property in any better condition that the state and condition of Property on the date of this Lease
前提是租户不必将物业改善到本租约签订日的物业状态和状况以上。

翻译成中文：26.4The Tenant shall replace the floor coverings at the Property within the three months before the end of the term with new ones of good quality and appropriate to the Property and the Permitted Use.
26.4 租户应在租期结束前的三个月内更换物业内的地面覆盖物，更换成质量良好且适合物业和许可使用的新材料。
翻译成中文All decoration carried out in the last three months of the term shall also be carried out to the satisfaction of the Landlord
在租期的最后三个月进行的所有装修工作也应符合房东的要求和满意。
翻译成中文：Not agreed. Why is this clause such a concern for your client?
未达成协议。为什么这个条款对您的客户如此重要？
翻译成中文：The Tenant shall maintain the state and condition of  the floor coverings at the Property
租户应保持物业地面覆盖物的状态和状况。

翻译成中文：29.2If the Landlord gives the Tenant notice no later than six months before the end of the term, the Tenant shall remove items, including any Signs, it has fixed to the Property, remove any alterations it has made to the Property (except to the extent that such removal would leave the Property insecure) and make good any damage caused to the Property by that removal.
29.2 如果房东在租期结束前最晚六个月向租户发出通知，租户应移除已固定在物业上的物品，包括任何标识，恢复任何对物业所做的改动（除非该移除会使物业不安全），并修复因此移除造成的任何物业损坏。
翻译成中文;Not agreed. Standard clause
未达成协议。标准条款。

翻译成中文：If the Tenant does not comply with its obligations in this clause, then, without prejudice to any other right or remedy of the Landlord, the Tenant shall pay the Landlord an amount equal to the Annual Rent at the rate reserved immediately before the end of the term for the period that it would reasonably take to put the Property into the condition it would have been in had the Tenant performed its obligations under this clause. The amount shall be a debt due on demand from the Tenant to the Landlord.Use

如果租户未能遵守本条款中的义务，除了房东拥有的其他权利或救济外，租户应向房东支付一个金额，该金额等于租期结束前立即预留的年租金金额，金额将用于合理地将物业恢复到租户在本条款下履行义务时应该达到的状态所需的时间期间。该金额将作为租户对房东的债务，根据要求需立即偿还给房东。

注：文中的“Use”为截断，无法看到完整内容，请提供完整句子或提问。
翻译成中文：Not agreed. Landlord would still need to be aware of the works
未达成协议。房东仍需了解相关工作。
